mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_role_menu_relation (role_id, menu_id) SELECT #{roleId} AS role_id, rp.menu_id FROM tbl_role re INNER JOIN tbl_role_menu_relation rp ON rp.role_id = re.id WHERE re.role_type = #{roleType}

delete.foreach: DELETE FROM tbl_role_menu_relation WHERE role_id = #{item.roleId} AND menu_id = #{item.menuId}
